# Ephermal

> Ephermal is an AI advertising agent for Shopify merchants. It automates Meta Ads and Google Ads — generating creatives, launching campaigns, and optimising ROAS — from a single dashboard, without an agency.

## What Ephermal Does

Ephermal connects to a Shopify store via OAuth and reads the live product catalog in real time. A team of 7 specialised AI agents — coordinated by an Orchestrator — handles every step of running paid advertising:

1. **Store Analyzer** — reads live catalog, pricing, and bestsellers; generates a permanent brand-intelligence brief (summary, target audience, brand vibe, color palette, UGC creative direction)
2. **Copy Agent** — writes headlines, hooks, and ad copy per product, grounded in the store's brand brief
3. **UGC Agent** — generates creator-style video and image ad scripts
4. **Meta Agent** — creates and manages Facebook and Instagram campaigns via the Meta Marketing API
5. **Google Agent** — handles Search, Shopping, and Performance Max via the Google Ads API
6. **Audience Agent** — builds custom and lookalike audiences from store data
7. **Analytics Agent** — tracks ROAS, MRR, and ad spend across platforms in one unified dashboard

## Additional Capabilities

- **Store Intelligence** — AI-generated brand brief (summary, target audience, brand vibe, color palette, typography direction) built from live Shopify data, reused across every ad-copy and creative generation call
- **MRR Tracker** — combines Shopify revenue, Meta ad spend, and Google ad spend into one time series with blended ROAS and month-over-month growth
- **Budget AI** — calculates optimal daily ad budget from a revenue goal, with human-confirmed one-click apply to live Meta/Google campaigns (never auto-applies without explicit approval)
- **Competitor Radar** — tracks competitor ad creative via the Meta Ad Library
- **Profit Tracker** — true margin per product using COGS input

## Pricing

- **Starter** — $89/month: Meta Ads automation, 15 UGC credits/month, 1 store
- **Growth** — $199/month: Meta + Google Ads, 75 UGC credits/month, Budget AI, Campaign Launcher
- **Scale** — $349/month: Unlimited stores, 350 UGC credits/month, white-label, dedicated AI instance

All plans billed monthly. Cancel any time.

## Key Facts

- Platform: Web SaaS (dashboard at ephermal.app)
- Integrations: Shopify, Meta Ads (Facebook/Instagram), Google Ads, Higgsfield AI (UGC video generation)
- Authentication: Shopify OAuth, Meta OAuth, Google OAuth
- AI stack: Claude (Anthropic) for brand strategy, store intelligence, and ad copywriting; Groq (llama-3.3-70b) for fast structured calculations (budgets, forecasts)
- Data storage: EU-hosted (Supabase EU region), GDPR compliant
- Payments: Stripe
- Founded: 2026
